Scenario:
, and I must output ONLY the XML block.
From the output format example:
```xml
[Concise scenario title]
[Industry] [Complexity] [Brief summary of the attack]
name=[Group or Campaign] [Motivation] [Skill Level]
[Industry] [Surface] [Vector]
AVAILABLE_SURFACES: [List]
AVAILABLE_VECTORS: [List]
[Attack stages]
[Brief summary]
